Anthony Gordon.note: Gordon gives England left-side speed and pressure, ideal when the match needs vertical running.
Anthony Gordon.noteZh: 戈登给英格兰左路速度和压迫，当比赛需要纵向跑动时很理想。

Bukayo Saka.note: Saka is England's right-side control point, able to turn isolated touches into clean chances.
Bukayo Saka.noteZh: 萨卡是英格兰右路控制点，能把孤立触球转成清晰机会。

Dan Burn.note: Burn gives England height on the left, useful for defending crosses and attacking restarts.
Dan Burn.noteZh: 伯恩给英格兰左侧带来高度，适合防守传中和进攻定位球。

Dean Henderson.note: Henderson offers England a sharp goalkeeper option with command on crosses and fast restarts.
Dean Henderson.noteZh: 亨德森给英格兰提供敏捷门将选择，能指挥传中并快速重启。

Declan Rice.note: Rice is England's midfield insurance, protecting transitions and carrying the ball out of pressure.
Declan Rice.noteZh: 赖斯是英格兰中场保险，能保护转换并带球摆脱压力。

Djed Spence.note: Spence gives England right-side speed, useful when the flank needs fresh running and recovery.
Djed Spence.noteZh: 斯彭斯给英格兰右侧带来速度，当边路需要新鲜跑动和回追时很有用。

Eberechi Eze.note: Eze gives England invention between the lines, especially when a dribble has to bend the block.
Eberechi Eze.noteZh: 埃泽给英格兰两线之间的创造力，尤其当盘带需要扭动防线时。

Elliot Anderson.note: Anderson adds midfield legs and tidy combinations, useful for keeping pressure alive.
Elliot Anderson.noteZh: 安德森增加中场跑动和整洁配合，适合让压力持续存在。

Ezri Konsa.note: Konsa gives England calm defensive coverage, especially when the back line has to defend space.
Ezri Konsa.noteZh: 孔萨给英格兰冷静防守覆盖，尤其当防线需要防守空间时。

Harry Kane.note: Kane is England's forward hub, dropping in to create before arriving to finish.
Harry Kane.noteZh: 凯恩是英格兰前场枢纽，能回撤创造，再到位终结。

Ivan Toney.note: Toney gives England a more physical striker route when the game asks for contact and crosses.
Ivan Toney.noteZh: 托尼给英格兰更身体化的中锋路线，当比赛需要接触和传中时很有用。

James Trafford.note: Trafford adds young goalkeeper depth, useful for distribution and reaction saves.
James Trafford.noteZh: 特拉福德增加年轻门将深度，适合出球和反应扑救。

Jarell Quansah.note: Quansah gives England a composed young centre-back who can pass forward and defend space.
Jarell Quansah.noteZh: 宽萨给英格兰冷静的年轻中卫，能向前传球，也能防守空间。

John Stones.note: Stones lets England blur defence and midfield, stepping in to create a cleaner extra pass.
John Stones.noteZh: 斯通斯让英格兰模糊防线和中场，能前提制造更干净的额外传球。

Jordan Henderson.note: Henderson gives England veteran organization, useful for managing pressure and game state.
Jordan Henderson.noteZh: 亨德森给英格兰老将组织力，适合管理压力和比赛状态。

Jordan Pickford.note: Pickford is England's tournament goalkeeper, trusted for big saves and direct distribution.
Jordan Pickford.noteZh: 皮克福德是英格兰大赛门将，关键扑救和直接出球都值得信任。

Jude Bellingham.note: Bellingham gives England force between midfield and attack, arriving as both creator and scorer.
Jude Bellingham.noteZh: 贝林厄姆给英格兰中前场之间带来力量，既能创造，也能作为得分点到位。

Kobbie Mainoo.note: Mainoo gives England calm in traffic, carrying through midfield without forcing the pass.
Kobbie Mainoo.noteZh: 梅努给英格兰拥挤区域的冷静，能带球穿过中场而不勉强传球。

Marc Guehi.note: Guéhi gives England clean defensive timing, especially when attacks test the channel.
Marc Guehi.noteZh: 格伊给英格兰干净的防守时机，尤其当进攻冲击通道时。

Marcus Rashford.note: Rashford gives England vertical threat, stretching the back line before the pass is played.
Marcus Rashford.noteZh: 拉什福德给英格兰纵向威胁，在传球送出前就能拉扯防线。

Morgan Rogers.note: Rogers adds power between the lines, useful when England need a runner through contact.
Morgan Rogers.noteZh: 罗杰斯增加两线之间的力量，当英格兰需要能顶着接触推进的跑动点时很有用。

Nico Oreilly.summary: Nico O'Reilly is an England midfielder from Manchester City who gives the national team midfield height, late box arrivals, and left-footed progression.
Nico Oreilly.note: O'Reilly gives England a tall midfield option, useful for late runs and left-footed progression.
Nico Oreilly.noteZh: 奥赖利给英格兰高大中场选择，适合后插上和左脚推进。

Noni Madueke.note: Madueke gives England another one-on-one winger, dangerous when he can isolate a full-back.
Noni Madueke.noteZh: 马杜埃凯给英格兰又一名一对一边锋，当他能单挑边后卫时很危险。

Ollie Watkins.note: Watkins gives England constant running beyond the line and a direct finishing threat.
Ollie Watkins.noteZh: 沃特金斯给英格兰持续冲击防线身后的跑动和直接终结威胁。

Reece James.note: James gives England elite right-back delivery and the strength to defend the same flank.
Reece James.noteZh: 里斯·詹姆斯给英格兰顶级右后卫传球，也有力量守住同一侧边路。

Trevoh Chalobah.note: Chalobah gives England defensive flexibility, able to cover centre-back or the right channel.
Trevoh Chalobah.noteZh: 查洛巴给英格兰防守灵活性，能覆盖中卫或右侧通道。
